message:
feat: schema evolution — addColumn and dropColumn

Add/drop columns without rewriting data. addColumn sets a default
value on all existing rows. dropColumn removes the column from
schema and rows. No data file rewrite needed.

Works on MaterializedExecutor (in-memory) now. Lance manifest-level
evolution for LocalExecutor/MasterDO is the same pattern — update
the schema in metadata, old fragments return null for new columns.
